title: ayenia macrantha
intro: Ayenia macrantha, also known as the velvet flower or velvet leaf, is a flowering plant species in the family Malpighiaceae. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in flavonoids and saponins, which possess medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ayenia macrantha include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Ayenia macrantha can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in traditional medicine to support immune function and overall well-being.
